title: Wombats produce cube-shaped feces via elastic intestinal walls — not a cube-shaped sphincter
description: Wombats are the only animals producing cube-shaped scat. Dissection and modelling revealed the mechanism is not sphincter geometry but variable wall elasticity in the distal intestine: two stiff grooves and two pliable regions alternate around the circumference, sculpting the feces into cubes during the final dehydration phase. The finding suggests a mould-free manufacturing technique for soft cubic structures.
